title: Silly Sentence Salad
short_description: Un-toss jumbled sentences — wrong answers get read aloud by a very unimpressed robot.
description: Someone tossed these sentences like a salad! Tap the word tiles to rebuild each sentence in the right order. Get it wrong and BEEP-3PO the robot reads your nonsense out loud in a perfectly serious robot voice, then judges you quietly. Grade bands ramp from short simple sentences to tricky clauses. Teaches word order, grammar and sentence structure, with first-try and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap. Tap words to move them between the salad and your sentence, then press Check.
